channel.title: Tryhackme on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Tryhackme on Classroom

item.title: Web App Pentesting: Injection & Client-Side Attacks — TryHackMe Notes
item.description: Comprehensive notes from the TryHackMe Web Application Pentesting path covering advanced SQL injection, XSS evasion, CSRF SameSite bypass, SSRF, and more -- with bug bounty applicability for each technique.

item.title: TryHackMe Hammer - Auth Bypass to RCE via Chained Vulnerabilities
item.description: Walkthrough of the TryHackMe Hammer challenge room -- chaining 5 vulnerabilities from directory fuzzing to RCE: email discovery in logs, OTP brute force via session rotation, JWT kid header exploitation, and command execution.

item.title: Exploiting Multi-Factor Authentication - TryHackMe Walkthrough
item.description: A practical walkthrough of exploiting Multi-Factor Authentication weaknesses. Covers OTP leakage, MFA bypass via logic flaws, and brute-forcing with auto-logout evasion -- from the TryHackMe Web Application Pentesting path.

item.title: TryHackMe Server-side Template Injection (SSTI)
item.description: TryHackMe SSTI room walkthrough — understanding Server-Side Template Injection, detecting template engines, exploiting Smarty/Pug/Jinja2/Twig, and mitigation strategies.

item.title: TryHackMe Multi-Factor Authentication
item.description: TryHackMe Multi-Factor Authentication room walkthrough — understanding MFA, common vulnerabilities, OTP leakage, insecure coding practices, and bypassing auto-logout features.

item.title: TryHackMe Web Application Pentesting Path - Theory Notes
item.description: Comprehensive notes from the TryHackMe Web Application Pentesting learning path covering injection attacks, server-side attacks, client-side attacks, and HTTP request smuggling.

item.title: Traverse - TryHackMe Walkthrough
item.description: TryHackMe Traverse walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Traverse challenge room.

item.title: Try Hack Me Benign Room Walkthrough
item.description: TryHackMe Benign walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Benign challenge room.

item.title: Try Hack Me Itsybitsy walkthrough
item.description: TryHackMe ItsyBitsy walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the ItsyBitsy challenge room.

item.title: Log Analysis With SIEM - TryHackMe Walkthrough
item.description: TryHackMe Log Analysis With SIEM walkthrough — practice Security Information and Event Management log analysis and threat detection.

item.title: Network Discovery Detection
item.description: TryHackMe Network Discovery Detection walkthrough — practice network security fundamentals including scanning, enumeration, and protocol analysis.

item.title: Healthgpt
item.description: TryHackMe Healthgpt walkthrough — A safety-compliant AI assistant that has strict rules against revealing sensitive internal data.

item.title: Input Manipulation & Prompt Injection
item.description: Try Hack Me Room Input Manipulation & Prompt Injection solved by Animesh Roy. this is a walkthrough. read more...

item.title: TryHackMe Man in the Middle Detection
item.description: TryHackMe Man in the Middle Detection walkthrough — This is a walkthrough;

item.title: Try Hack Me Intermediate Nmap
item.description: TryHackMe Intermediate Nmap walkthrough — master Nmap network scanning techniques including service detection, scripting engine, and firewall evasion.

item.title: Try Hack Me Phishing Emails 4
item.description: TryHackMe Phishing Emails 4 walkthrough — analyze phishing emails, identify social engineering techniques, and examine malicious headers and payloads.

item.title: Try Hack Me Red Team Threat Intel
item.description: TryHackMe Red Team Threat Intel walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Red Team Threat Intel challenge room.

item.title: Try Hack Me Operating System Security [WriteUp]
item.description: TryHackMe Operating System Security walkthrough — understand operating system security fundamentals including hardening, access controls, and common weaknesses.

item.title: TryHackMe Oh My Webserver
item.description: TryHackMe Oh My Webserver walkthrough — exploit web application vulnerabilities and practice common web attack techniques.

item.title: TryHackMe Jr Security Analyst Intro
item.description: TryHackMe Jr Security Analyst Intro walkthrough — introduction to SOC analyst responsibilities, alert triage, and incident response fundamentals.

item.title: TryHackMe Phishing Emails 2
item.description: TryHackMe Phishing Emails 2 walkthrough — analyze phishing emails, identify social engineering techniques, and examine malicious headers and payloads.

item.title: Try Hack Me Phishing Emails 1
item.description: TryHackMe Phishing Emails 1 walkthrough — analyze phishing emails, identify social engineering techniques, and examine malicious headers and payloads.

item.title: Try Hack Me Android Malware Analysis
item.description: TryHackMe Android Malware Analysis walkthrough — Android malware analysis with Pithus (static and hunting)

item.title: Try Hack Me Road
item.description: TryHackMe Road walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Road challenge room.

item.title: Try Hack Me CyberCrafted
item.description: TryHackMe CyberCrafted walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the CyberCrafted challenge room.

item.title: Try Hack Me REvil Corp
item.description: TryHackMe REvil Corp walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the REvil Corp challenge room.

item.title: Try Hack Me Phishing
item.description: TryHackMe Phishing walkthrough — analyze phishing emails, identify social engineering techniques, and examine malicious headers and payloads.

item.title: Try Hack Me Vulnerability Capstone[writeup]
item.description: TryHackMe Vulnerability Capstone walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Vulnerability Capstone challenge room.

item.title: Try Hack Me Net Sec Challenge
item.description: TryHackMe Net Sec Challenge walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Net Sec Challenge challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Metasploit Meterpreter
item.description: Take a deep dive into Meterpreter, and see how in-memory payloads can be used for post-exploitation. TryHackMe Room Metasploit Meterpreter solved by Animesh Roy. this is a walkthrough. read more...

item.title: Try Hack Me Exploit Vulnerabilities
item.description: TryHackMe Exploit Vulnerabilities walkthrough — identify and exploit vulnerabilities in target systems to gain unauthorized access.

item.title: Try Hack Me Vulnerabilities 101
item.description: TryHackMe Vulnerabilities 101 walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Vulnerabilities 101 challenge room.

item.title: Try Hack Me Empline
item.description: TryHackMe Empline walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Empline challenge room.

item.title: Try Hack Me The Cod Caper
item.description: TryHackMe The Cod Caper walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the The Cod Caper challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Introduction to Django
item.description: TryHackMe Introduction to Django walkthrough — learn Django web framework fundamentals including models, views, templates, and common security pitfalls.

item.title: TryHackMe Wordpress CVE-2021-29447
item.description: TryHackMe Wordpress CVE-2021-29447 walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Wordpress CVE-2021-29447 challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Intro to Windows
item.description: TryHackMe Intro to Windows walkthrough — explore Windows operating system fundamentals, security features, and common attack surfaces.

item.title: TryHackMe Bounty Hacker
item.description: TryHackMe Bounty Hacker walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Bounty Hacker challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Hacking with PowerShell
item.description: TryHackMe Hacking with PowerShell walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Hacking with PowerShell challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Super-Spam
item.description: TryHackMe Super-Spam walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Super-Spam challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Internal
item.description: TryHackMe Internal walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Internal challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Mobile Malware Analysis
item.description: TryHackMe Mobile Malware Analysis walkthrough — analyze malware samples using static and dynamic analysis techniques to understand malicious behavior.

item.title: TryHackMe Relevant
item.description: TryHackMe Relevant walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Relevant challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Linux Strength Training
item.description: TryHackMe Linux Strength Training walkthrough — Guided room for beginners to learn/reinforce linux command line skills...

item.title: TryHackMe Sweettooth Inc.
item.description: TryHackMe Sweettooth Inc. walkthrough — Sweettooth Inc. needs your help to find out how secure their system is!

item.title: Giveaway July 2021
item.description: Win a free 1-month TryHackMe subscription! July 2021 giveaway with 3 premium subscriptions up for grabs.

item.title: TryHackMe Agent Sudo Walkthrough - CTF Writeup
item.description: TryHackMe Room Agent Sudo, You found a secret server located under the deep sea. Your task is to hack inside the server and reveal the truth.

item.title: TryHackMe Overpass 2 - Hacked
item.description: TryHackMe Overpass 2 - Hacked walkthrough — investigate a compromised server, analyze attacker artifacts, and trace the intrusion timeline.

item.title: TryHackMe Baron Samedit
item.description: TryHackMe Baron Samedit walkthrough — A tutorial room exploring CVE-2021-3156 in the Unix Sudo Program.

item.title: TryHackMe Metamorphosis
item.description: TryHackMe Metamorphosis walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Metamorphosis challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Crack the hash
item.description: TryHackMe Crack the hash walkthrough — Cracking hashes challenges.

item.title: TryHackMe Simple CTF
item.description: TryHackMe Simple CTF walkthrough — solve CTF challenges covering enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on a vulnerable target.

item.title: TryHackMe RazorBlack
item.description: TryHackMe RazorBlack walkthrough — These guys call themselves hackers. Can you show them who's the boss ??

item.title: TryHackMe Linux Function Hooking
item.description: TryHackMe Linux Function Hooking walkthrough — Learn about function hooking in Linux and have fun hooking functions

item.title: TryHackMe Ffuf
item.description: TryHackMe Ffuf walkthrough — Ffuf stands for Fuzz Faster U Fool. It's a tool used for web enumeration, fuzzing, and directory brute forcing...

item.title: Try Hack Me Web Scanning
item.description: TryHackMe Web Scanning walkthrough — exploit web application vulnerabilities and practice common web attack techniques.

item.title: TryHackMe The find command
item.description: TryHackMe The find command walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the The find command challenge room.

item.description: TryHackMe Tmux walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Tmux challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Crisis
item.description: TryHackMe Crisis walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Crisis challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Couch
item.description: TryHackMe Couch walkthrough — Hack into a vulnerable database server that collects and stores data in JSON-based document formats, in this semi-guided challenge.

item.title: TryHackMe Inclusion
item.description: TryHackMe Room inclusion, A beginner level LFI challenge. solved by Animesh Roy. this is a walkthrough. read more...

item.title: TryHackMe RootMe
item.description: TryHackMe RootMe walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the RootMe challenge room.

item.title: TryHackMe Gitandcrumpets
item.description: TryHackMe Gitandcrumpets walkthrough — exploit exposed Git repositories to extract secrets, credentials, and sensitive source code.

item.title: TryHackMe Postexploit
item.description: TryHackMe Postexploit walkthrough — identify and exploit vulnerabilities in target systems to gain unauthorized access.

item.title: TryHackMe Hydra
item.description: TryHackMe Hydra walkthrough — learn brute-force password attacks using Hydra against SSH, FTP, and web login forms.

item.description: TryHackMe Room Ice walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Room Ice challenge room.

item.description: TryHackMe Thm Room Web Fundamentals walkthrough — exploit web application vulnerabilities and practice common web attack techniques.

item.description: TryHackMe Writeup REMnux - The Redux walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Writeup REMnux - The Redux challenge room.

item.description: TryHackMe BasicMalwareRE walkthrough — analyze malware samples using static and dynamic analysis techniques to understand malicious behavior.

item.description: TryHackMe Room Malstrings walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Room Malstrings challenge room.

item.description: TryHackMe Room Malware Introductory walkthrough — analyze malware samples using static and dynamic analysis techniques to understand malicious behavior.

item.description: TryHackMe Room Volatility walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Room Volatility challenge room.

item.description: TryHackMe Room Attacking Kerberos walkthrough — Learn how to abuse the Kerberos Ticket Granting Service inside of a Windows Domain Controller.

item.description: TryHackMe Room Attacktivedirectory walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Room Attacktivedirectory challenge room.

item.description: TryHackMe Room Osquery walkthrough — learn endpoint monitoring with osquery SQL-based queries for process, network, and file system analysis.
